name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a double boiler.
2. Cook over simmering water until thick and creamy, stirring frequently. Stir more often as it thickens.
3. Ensure the water in the bottom of the pan is not touching the base of the top pan.
4. Cook for about 15-20 minutes.
5. The recipe makes approximately 1-1/2 cups.
